title: Jain-friendly eggless custom cakes for Auburn and Lidcombe families
summary:
Looking for a cake without onion, garlic, or eggs for a Jain celebration in Auburn or Lidcombe? That's not a special request here — it's the only way we bake.

Every Num Num's cake is 100% eggless, and our Jain-friendly cakes skip onion, garlic, and root vegetables in the decoration too. Six sizes, 15 flavours, any design from your photo reference.

48 hours minimum notice. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park — open until 10pm daily.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: cake without onion garlic eggs for Jain celebration
